indicators: Approximately 11 distinct emission lines are observed across the visible spectrum.
Multiple closely spaced lines are present in the deep violet/purple region on the far left.
A distinct light blue line is visible following the violet lines.
A prominent green line is located in the mid-left portion of the spectrum.
A doublet of two very close yellow lines is clearly visible in the middle of the spectrum.
A doublet of two very close orange lines is observed to the right of the yellow lines.
A distinct red line is present on the far right of the spectrum.
No flammable gases or combustion byproducts detected
